items.file: DIAMOND ANTI AGEING THERAPY – FACIAL KIT.docx
items.stem: DIAMOND ANTI AGEING THERAPY – FACIAL KIT
items.description: DIAMOND ANTI AGEING THERAPY – FACIAL KIT Step: 1 – Diamond Gentle Exfoliating Facial Scrub : Enriched with botanical extract like Aloe vera extract, Mulberry extract, Lemon peel extract and Liquorice ( Glycyrhiza Glabra) Extract. The exfoliating scrub having soft granules penetrate deep into the skin to clean clogged pores while removing black heads leaving a blemish free, smooth and soft skin. INGREDIENTS: Purified Water, Glycerine, Light Liquid Paraffin, Glyceryl Monostearate, Cetostearyl Alcohol, Sesame Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Scrub Beads, Titanium Dioxide, Stearic Acid, Aloe Vera Extract, Butyrospermum Parki (Shea Butter), Mulberry (Morus alba) Extract, Lemon (Citrus medica limonum ) Peel Extract, Liquorice ( Glycymhiza Glabra) Extract, Polysorbate 80, Glyceryl Stearate, Polyethylene Glycol 100 Stearate, Perfume, Phenoxyethanol, Methy|paraben , Propylparaben, Allantoin, Disodium Ethylenediaminetetra Acetic Acid. DIRECTION FOR USE: Apply this scrub lavishly all over the face and neck. Massage gently for 2-3 minutes upward and downward strokes, wash off with plain water . Step: 2 - Diamond Youthful Energizing Cream : Diamond youthful energizing cream helps to improve blood circulation, restore softness and smoothness. The excellent energizing cream improves cell regeneration, making skin younger and radiant. The cream nourishes, hydrates, rejuvenate the skin. INGREDIENTS: Purified Water, Light Liquid Paraffin, Beeswax Bleached, Emulsifying Wax, Glycerine, Sweet Almond (Prunus amygdalus dulcis) Oil, Glyceryl Monostearate, Isopropyl Myristate, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea Butter), Sesame Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Mulberry (Morus alba) Extract, Papaya (Carica papaya) Extract, Polysorbate 80, Cyclomethicone , Xylitylglucoside , Glyceryl Stearate, Polyethylene Glycol 100 Stearate, Tomato (Solanum lycopersicum ) Fruit Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Fragrance, Borax, Methylparaben, Anhydroxylitol , Xylitol, Propylparaben, Vitamin E, Disodium Ethylenediaminetetra Acetic Acid, Allantoin. . DIRECTION FOR USE: Add 2-3 drops of Lightening & Brightening Serum with the cream to apply all over face & neck. Moisten hand with cold water, gently massage for 10-15 minutes & remove with damp cotton. Step: 3 - Lightening & Brightening Serum Moisturises the skin, give extra radiance and instant whitening. INGREDIENTS: Purified Water, Glycerine, Liqourice (Glycyrrhiza Glabra) Extract, Papaya (Carica papaya) Extract, Aloe Vera Extract, Green Tea (Camellia sinensis) Extract, Sodium Acrylates Copolymer, Glycolic Acid, Xylityiglucoside , Pea (Pisum sativum) Extract, Lactic Acid, Caprylyl Glycol, Niacinamide, Fragrance, Anhydroxylitol , Xylitol, Xanthan Gum, Alpha Arbutin, Disodium Ethylenediaminetetra Acetic Acid, Caprylhydroxamic Acid. DIRECTION FOR USE: Add 2-3 drop in Massage Cream & Face Pack. Also apply after facial for extra glow. Step: 4 - Diamond Massage Gel This moisturizing Gel enriched with Bearberry extract, Aloe vera extract, Cucumber extract and Xylitylglucoside is most flexible to suited to all skin type. This is easily absorbed by the skin while providing maximum nourishment . INGREDIENTS: Purified Water, Glycerine, Propylene Glycol, Aloe Vera Extract, Liquorice (Glycyrrhiza Glabra) Extract, Bearberry leaf (Uva Ursi) Extract, Cucumber (Cucumis Sativus) Extract, PEG 12 Dimethicone, Carbomer, Triethanolamine, Xylitylglucoside , Polysorbate 20, Pea (Pisum sativum) Extract, Imidazolidinyl Urea, Phenoxyethanol, Perfume, Cinnamon Oil, Anhydraxylitol , Xylitol, Disodium Ethylenediaminetetra Acetic Acid . DIRECTION FOR USE: Apply this gel lavishly all over the face and neck. Massage gently for 2-3 minutes upward and downward strokes . Step: 5 - Diamond Skin Tightening Mask : The luxurious mask is enriched with herbal extracts, Aloe vera extract, Liquorice (Glycyrrhiza Glabra) Extract and Mulberry extract. It reduces the transfer of melanin to the skin and making skin fairer, smoother and softer. INGREDIENTS: Purified Water, Kaolin, Glycerine, Zinc Oxide, Titanium Dioxide, Emulsifying Wax, Sweet Almond (Prunus amygdalus dulcis) Oil, Aloe Vera Extract, Octyl Methoxycinnamate, Lanolin Anhydrous Acacia Gum,, Liquorice (Glycyrrhiza Glabra) Extract, Mulberry (Morus alba) Extract, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea Butter), Lactic Acid, Magnesium Aluminum Silicate, Glyceryl Stearate, Polyethylene Glycol 100 Stearate, Perfume, Vitamin E, Xanthan Gum, Allantoin, Methylchloroisothiazoli none, Methylisothiazolinone. DIRECTION FOR USE: Apply a generous amount of this pack on face and neck leaving eyes. Relax till completely dry. Rinse with plain water .

SKIN LIGHTNING, REJUVENATING, HYDRATING, GLOW ENHANCING – FACIAL KIT Step: 1 – Fruit Mix Cleansing Cream : This cream contains of extract Papaya, lemon, Cucumber and Ananas Sativus which help in removing dead cells along with breaking down the inactive proteins. Thus, it leaves the skin super soft and radiant. INGREDIENTS: Sesame Oil, Sweet Almond (Prunus amygdalus dulcis) Oil, Papaya (Carica papaya) Extract, Ananas Sativus (Pineapple) Fruit Extract, Cucumber (Cucumis Sativus) Extract, Lemon (Citrus medica limonum) Extract. DIRECTION FOR USE: Apply on the face and neck and massaged gently in circular motion for 5 minutes. Wash off with fresh water and pat dry. Step: 2 – Fruit Mix Exfoliating Scrub : Enriched with the goodness of Pomegranate extract, Aloe Vera extract and Papaya extract, Cucumber extract, this formulation gently removes the dead cell of facial skin. It improves the skin complexion and lightens the patches. INGREDIENTS: Aloe Vera Extract, Sesame Oil, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea Butter), Papaya (Carica papaya) Extract, Pomegranate (Punica granatum) Extract, Cucumber (Cucumis Sativus) Extract, Ananas Sativus (Pineapple) Fruit Extract DIRECTION FOR USE: Apply on the face and neck, massage gently in circular direction for 5-10 minutes. Wash with fresh water, pat dry . Step: 3 – Fruit Mix Massage Cream: This is a rich composition of Mulberry Extract, Papaya Extract, Ananas Sativus and Vitamin E. It improves the skin complexion and nourishes it with all necessary mineral and vitamins. INGREDIENTS: Sweet Almond (Prunus amygdalus dulcis) Oil, Mulberry (Morus alba) Extract, Papaya (Carica papaya) Extract, Ananas Sativus (Pineapple) Fruit Extract, Pomegranate (Punica granatum) Extract, Cucumber (Cucumis Sativus) Extract, Vitamin E . DIRECTION FOR USE: Apply all over the face and neck. Massage for 15-20 minutes in circular motion with firm upward and outward strokes. Massage until cream gets absorbed in the skin. Step: 4 – Fruit Mix Face Pack This formulation contains Sweet Almond Oil, Bearberry Leaf Extract, Aloe vera extract, Cucumber extract, this combination not only tighten the skin pores but removes blemishes, dark spot, evens skin tone and brings a glow to the skin . INGREDIENTS: Purified Water, Glycerine, Propylene Glycol, Aloe Vera Extract, Liquorice (Glycymhiza Glabra) Extract, Cucumber (Cucumis Sativus) Extract, Mulberry (Morus alba) Extract, PEG 12 Dimethicone, Carbomer, Triethanolamine, Polysorbate 20, Xylitylglucoside, Pea (Pisum sativum) Extract, Imidazolidinyl Urea, Phenoxyethanol, Fragrance, Cinnamon Oil, Anhydroxylitol, Xylitol, Hydrolyzed Pearl. DIRECTION FOR USE: Apply a thick layer all over f ace and neck, leave it until gets dry. Rinse off with fresh water. Step: 5 - Lightening & Brightening Serum Moisturises the skin, give extra radiance and instant whitening. INGREDIENTS: Purified Water, Glycerine, Liqourice (Glycyrrhiza Glabra) Extract, Papaya (Carica papaya) Extract, Aloe Vera Extract, Green Tea (Camellia sinensis) Extract, Sodium Acrylates Copolymer, Glycolic Acid, Xylityiglucoside, Pea (Pisum sativum) Extract, Lactic Acid, Caprylyl Glycol, Niacinamide, Fragrance, Anhydroxylitol, Xylitol, Xanthan Gum, Alpha Arbutin, Disodium Ethylenediaminetetra Acetic Acid, Caprylhydroxamic Acid. DIRECTION FOR USE: Apply a few drops of this serum on your face and tap gently with your fingertips until gets absorbed .

items.file: GOLD SKIN GLOW THERAPY – FACIAL KIT.docx
items.stem: GOLD SKIN GLOW THERAPY – FACIAL KIT
items.description: GOLD SKIN GLOW THERAPY – FACIAL KIT Step: 1 – Gold Gel Scrub: This 24-carat gold gel scrub will help reveal a smoother, clearer and youthful skin. The excellent gel having soft granules penetrate deep into the skin to clean clogged pores and removes black head from skin and skin restores softness, smoothness and radiance. DIRECTION FOR USE: Apply this gel scrub lavishly all over the face and neck. Massage gently for 2-3 minutes upward and downward strokes, Wash off with plain water. Step: 2 - Gold Massage Cream : This 24-carat gold Massage cream that helps improve blood circulation restore softness smoothness and radiance. The excellent Massage cream improve the quality of cell regeneration and glow while making skin look younger . DIRECTION FOR USE: Add 2-3 drops of Lightening & Brightening Serum with the cream to apply all over face & neck. Moisten hand with cold water, gently massage for 10-15 minutes & remove with damp cotton. Step: 3 - Lightening & Brightening Serum Moisturises the skin, give extra radiance and instant whitening. INGREDIENTS: Purified Water, Glycerine, Liqourice (Glycyrrhiza Glabra) Extract, Papaya (Carica papaya) Extract, Aloe Vera Extract, Green Tea (Camellia sinensis) Extract, Sodium Acrylates Copolymer, Glycolic Acid, Xylityiglucoside, Pea (Pisum sativum) Extract, Lactic Acid, Caprylyl Glycol, Niacinamide, Fragrance, Anhydroxylitol, Xylitol, Xanthan Gum, Alpha Arbutin, Disodium Ethylenediaminetetra Acetic Acid, Caprylhydroxamic Acid. DIRECTION FOR USE: Add 2-3 drop in Massage Cream & Face Pack. Also apply after facial for extra glow. Step: 4 - Gold Radiance Massage Gel : This 24-carat gold radiance gel helps to improve blood circulation restore softness, smoothness and radiance. The excellent gel improves the quality of cell regeneration and glow while making skin look younger. INGREDIENTS: Purified Water, Glycerine, Propylene Glycol, Aloe Vera (Aloe Barbadensis) Oil, Liquorice (Glycyrrhiza Glabra) Extract, Xylityiglucoside, Mulberry (Morus alba) Extract, Cucumber (Cucumis Sativus) Extract, PEG 12 Dimethicone, Carbomer, Triethanolamine, Polysorbate 20, Pea (Pisum sativum) Extract, Cinnamon Oil, midazoliding/ Urea, Phenoxyethanol, Perfume, Anhydroxylitol, Anhydroxylitol, 24K Gold flakes. DIRECTION FOR USE: Apply this gel lavishly all over the face and neck. Massage gently for 2-3 minutes upward and downward strokes . Step: 5 - Gold Pack : This Gold pack contains natural extract of Liquorice Extract, Mulberry extract, aloevera extract and other precious ingredients Gold Foil that lighten the skin and control production of melanin & making skin fairer and lighten facial tone. INGREDIENTS: Purified Water, Kaolin, Glycerine, Zinc Oxide, Sweet Almond (Prunus amygdalus dulcis) Oil, Titanium Dioxide, Emulsifying Wax, Octyl Methoxycinnamate, Lanolin Anhydrous, Carrot (Daucus carota) Seed Oil, Acacia Gum, Aloe Vera Extract, Liquorice (Glycyrrhiza Glabra) Extract, Mulberry (Morus alba) Extract, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea Butter), Lactic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Polyethylene Glycol 100 Stearate, Magnesium Aluminum Silicate, Xanthan Gum, Perfume, Vitamin E, Allantoin, Methylchloroisothiazoli none, Methylisothiazolinone, 24K Gold flakes. DIRECTION FOR USE: Apply a generous amount of this pack on face and neck leaving eyes. Relax till completely dry. Rinse with plain water .

INGREDIENTS: Purified Water, Glycerine, Liqourice (Glycyrrhiza Glabra) Extract, Papaya (Carica papaya) Extract, Aloe Vera Extract, Green Tea (Camellia sinensis) Extract, Sodium Acrylates Copolymer, Glycolic Acid, Xylityiglucoside, Pea (Pisum sativum) Extract, Lactic Acid, Caprylyl Glycol, Niacinamide, Fragrance, Anhydroxylitol, Xylitol, Xanthan Gum, Alpha Arbutin, Disodium Ethylenediaminetetra Acetic Acid, Caprylhydroxamic Acid. It reduces the transfer of melanin to the skin, making skin fairer, smoother and softer.
